response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video as a promotional segment for a VTuber birthday festival. The video consists entirely of dialogue, speech, and a merchandise showcase. There is light instrumental BGM, but no vocal songs were performed in their entirety. Sung phrases were brief and were not part of a full song structure.
response.global_summary: A birthday celebration promotional video featuring Hololive VTubers Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine, Usada Pekora, and Flare, discussing event details and showcasing merchandise for the 2025 Birthday Festival.

scenes.description: VTubers Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine, Usada Pekora, and Flare introduce the birthday festival event on stage.
The group interacts with dialogue, followed by a brief, sung phrase by Noel.
Shirogane Noel presents various birthday merchandise items with on-screen illustrations.
